query:
SELECT 
            COUNT(*)::int as "total!",
            AVG(score) as avg_score,
            AVG(percentage) as avg_percentage,
            COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN is_passed THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0)::int as "passed!"
        FROM quiz_attempts
        WHERE user_id = $1
        AND completed_at IS NOT NULL
